objective: Efficiently manage high-volume chats and prioritise high-value fans.
behaviour_rules: Use unread tab during high traffic
Prioritise fans based on buying potential
decision_logic: If new messages → refresh chat list
If multiple fans message → open in tabs
If fan is high value → monitor every 60 seconds
If message read and no reply → send follow-up
If re-engaging → sort oldest first and personalise message
conversation_examples: good morning John… i was just thinking about you
